title: × Anacamptorchis celtiberica
intro: × Anacamptorchis celtiberica, also known as the Iberian orchid, is a hybrid orchid species that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its potential health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate various health issues such as colds, fever, and skin irritations. The bioactive constituents of × Anacamptorchis celtiberica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is made into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in the production of creams and ointments for topical application.
